_comment: The ONLY hand-authored reading config. The reading menu itself is derived from the DB (language_families / languages / transcription_systems); this overlay supplies only what the schema cannot: initial checked state and labels the schema lacks, plus non-reading sources that have no language->reading->transcription tree. Leaf ids are the ':'-joined chain of languages.code / readings.category / transcription_systems.code (e.g. 'cmn:pinyin', 'ja:on:kana', 'cmn:definitions'); they are an append-only contract (see plan section 9).
_default_off_comment: Initial checked state is DERIVED: a language's primary transcription (lowest sort_order that renders) + its Definitions leaf are on, everything else off. List here only the ids that the derived rule would turn ON but should start OFF.
_non_reading_sources_comment: Sources with no reading tree, declared explicitly. `handler` selects the server fetch; `render.type` selects the client RENDERERS key (independent namespaces).
